steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Petrobras fundamental indicators
from decimal import Decimal
# Provided values
price = 39.0
# shares from composition 2023-12-31
total_shares_issued = 13044496930
total_shares_treasury = 104359669
shares_outstanding = total_shares_issued - total_shares_treasury

# Balance sheet (2024-03-31 ÚLTIMO)
assets = 1067292000000.0
current_assets = 165964000000.0
cash_eq = 57689000000.0
financial_investments = 24072000000.0
accounts_receivable = 25184000000.0
inventories = 40849000000.0
other_current_assets = 10469000000.0

noncurrent_assets = 901328000000.0

liabilities = 1067292000000.0
current_liabilities = 153876000000.0
suppliers = 25801000000.0
current_loans = 61798000000.0
other_current = 34402000000.0
provisions_current = 14710000000.0

noncurrent_liabilities = 503494000000.0
long_term_loans = 247157000000.0

equity_consolidated = 409922000000.0
# parent equity (Patrimônio Líquido - Saldos Finais) from 5.07 row
equity_parent = 407636000000.0
noncontrolling = 2286000000.0

# Income statement: quarterly and annual
# Q1 2024 (ÚLTIMO quarter values)
rev_q1_2024 = 117721000000.0
cogs_q1_2024 = -57020000000.0
gross_q1_2024 = 60701000000.0
op_q1_2024 = -16674000000.0
ebit_q1_2024 = 44027000000.0
finance_q1_2024 = -9579000000.0
pretax_q1_2024 = 34448000000.0
tax_q1_2024 = -10638000000.0
net_q1_2024 = 23810000000.0
net_attrib_q1_2024 = 23700000000.0

# Q1 2023 (PENÚLTIMO quarter values)
rev_q1_2023 = 139068000000.0
cogs_q1_2023 = -65757000000.0
gross_q1_2023 = 73311000000.0
op_q1_2023 = -13114000000.0
ebit_q1_2023 = 60197000000.0
finance_q1_2023 = -3200000000.0
pretax_q1_2023 = 56997000000.0
tax_q1_2023 = -18690000000.0
net_q1_2023 = 38307000000.0
net_attrib_q1_2023 = 38156000000.0

# Annual 2023 (ÚLTIMO in annual report provided in trimes anterior)
rev_2023 = 511994000000.0
gross_2023 = 269933000000.0
ebit_2023 = 189342000000.0
dep_2023 = 76020000000.0
net_2023 = 125166000000.0
net_attrib_2023 = 124606000000.0

# Depreciation Q1
dep_q1_2024 = 16648000000.0
dep_q1_2023 = 15186000000.0

# Receitas full-year 2023 in other table also given as 694684000000 for 'Receitas' but we'll use sales

# Calculations
shares_outstanding, total_shares_issued

market_cap = price * shares_outstanding

# Debt
gross_debt = current_loans + long_term_loans
liquid_assets = cash_eq + financial_investments
net_debt = gross_debt - liquid_assets

# TTM calculations: trailing twelve months ending 2024-03-31 = annual 2023 + Q1 2024 - Q1 2023
rev_ttm = rev_2023 + rev_q1_2024 - rev_q1_2023
gross_ttm = gross_2023 + gross_q1_2024 - gross_q1_2023
ebit_ttm = ebit_2023 + ebit_q1_2024 - ebit_q1_2023
dep_ttm = dep_2023 + dep_q1_2024 - dep_q1_2023
ebitda_ttm = ebit_ttm + dep_ttm
net_ttm = net_2023 + net_q1_2024 - net_q1_2023
net_attrib_ttm = net_attrib_2023 + net_attrib_q1_2024 - net_attrib_q1_2023

# Per-share metrics
lpa = net_attrib_ttm / shares_outstanding
vpa = equity_parent / shares_outstanding

def per_share(x):
    return x / shares_outstanding

# Ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
pvp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = price / (ebit_ttm / shares_outstanding) if ebit_ttm!=0 else None
psr = price / (rev_ttm / shares_outstanding) if rev_ttm!=0 else None
p_ativos = price / (assets / shares_outstanding)
cap_giro = current_assets - current_liabilities
p_cap_giro = price / (cap_giro / shares_outstanding) if cap_giro!=0 else None
ativ_circ_liq = current_assets - inventories
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / (ativ_circ_liq / shares_outstanding) if ativ_circ_liq!=0 else None

# EV metrics
enterprise_value = market_cap + net_debt
ev_ebitda = enterprise_value / ebitda_ttm if ebitda_ttm!=0 else None
ev_ebit = enterprise_value / ebit_ttm if ebit_ttm!=0 else None

# Margins
marg_bruta = gross_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_ebit = ebit_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None
marg_liquida = net_ttm / rev_ttm * 100 if rev_ttm!=0 else None

# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_ativo = ebit_ttm / assets * 100 if assets!=0 else None

# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = assets - suppliers - cash_eq
roic = ebit_ttm / roic_denom * 100 if roic_denom!=0 else None

# ROE
roe = net_attrib_ttm / equity_parent * 100 if equity_parent!=0 else None

# Liquidity current: ativo circulante líquido / passivo circulante
ativo_circ_liq_for_liquidez = current_assets - inventories
liquidez_corr = ativo_circ_liq_for_liquidez / current_liabilities if current_liabilities!=0 else None

# Div Br / Patrim
div_br_pat = gross_debt / equity_parent if equity_parent!=0 else None

# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = rev_ttm / assets if assets!=0 else None

# Prepare results
results = {
    'shares_outstanding': shares_outstanding,
    'market_cap': market_cap,
    'gross_debt': gross_debt,
    'net_debt': net_debt,
    'liquid_assets': liquid_assets,
    'rev_ttm': rev_ttm,
    'ebit_ttm': ebit_ttm,
    'net_ttm': net_ttm,
    'rev_q1_2024': rev_q1_2024,
    'ebit_q1_2024': ebit_q1_2024,
    'net_q1_2024': net_q1_2024,
    'lpa': lpa,
    'vpa': vpa,
    'pl': pl,
    'pvp': pvp,
    'p_ebit': p_ebit,
    'psr': psr,
    'p_ativos': p_ativos,
    'p_cap_giro': p_cap_giro,
    'p_ativ_circ_liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'ev_ebitda': ev_ebitda,
    'ev_ebit': ev_ebit,
    'marg_bruta': marg_bruta,
    'marg_ebit': marg_ebit,
    'marg_liquida': marg_liquida,
    'ebit_ativo': ebit_ativo,
    'roic': roic,
    'roe': roe,
    'liquidez_corr': liquidez_corr,
    'div_br_pat': div_br_pat,
    'giro_ativos': giro_ativos,
    'enterprise_value': enterprise_value,
    'ebitda_ttm': ebitda_ttm
}

# Print nicely
import json
print(json.dumps(results, indent=2))
"} }
